programme.desc: Doreen steals pills from the surgery and plants them under Lynn's pillow.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 42

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 43
programme.desc: Lynn refuses to forgive Doreen, who is distraught about recent events.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 44
programme.desc: The kidnappers refuse to believe their captive isn't Monica.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 45

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 46
programme.desc: Lizzie befriends Edie, and the key to Joyce's safety deposit box goes missing.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 47
programme.desc: The prison is under strict security to prevent the safe deposit key being smuggled out.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 48

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 49

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 53

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 54

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 56

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 57

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 58

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 59

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 60

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 61

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 63

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 64

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 65

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After failing to show respect for their teacher, PC Principal revokes Pyjama Day privileges for the entire 4th grade class on the most important day of the year.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Stan is horrified to realise that he's misinterpreted some of the greatest writing of all time and dedicates himself to curing his unconscious bias by reading The Lord of the Rings.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Cartman is furious with his mom when she tells him about her new job.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 4
programme.desc: With world tensions escalating, a lot is riding on Butterâ€™s ability to crush the Russian competition in the all-important Under 10s Dressage Championship.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The boys find out that the joys of playing Airsoft come with the challenges of dealing with teenagers.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Butters is shocked to learn that people in South Park don't understand what St. Patrick's Day is really about.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Cartman Gets An Anal Probe: Cartman dreams he has a close encounter with an alien. The other boys are convinced the dream was real, and that he has been the victim of an alien anal probe. (S1, E01)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When Cartman's environmental essay wins a national contest, America's sweetheart, Kathie Lee Gifford, comes to South Park to present the award.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A weekend trip to experience the finer points of camping, fishing and blowing animals to smithereens is threatened by an erupting volcano.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: An Elephant Makes Love To A Pig: Kyle calls in genetic engineer Dr. Mephisto to crossbreed his pet elephant and Cartman's pot-bellied pig in a bid to win a science competition. (S1, E05)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Death: Stan's ancient grandfather attempts to trick the boys into killing him. Meanwhile, the parents of South Park lobby a TV network to rid the airwaves of Terrance and Phillip. (S1, E06)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A mishap at the morgue transforms the residents of South Park into brain-eating zombies and threatens the boys night of Trick-or-Treating.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Thanksgiving Episode- Mistaking Cartman for a starving African child, government authorities send him to Ethiopia where he runs into Sally Struthers.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Mr Hankey, The Christmas Poo: The Mayor decides to impose a holiday theme which won't offend anybody. Kyle tries to convince everyone that Mr Hankey (a singing Christmas poo) exists. (S1, E09)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Damien: The new kid in class persuades Jesus to do battle with his father, Satan, in the final battle of good versus evil. Cartman is livid to learn the bout clashes with his birthday. (S1, E10)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Tom's Rhinoplasty: The boys become lesbians to impress a new teacher, making Wendy jealous. Also, to his delight, Mr. Garrison's plastic surgery leaves him looking like David Hasselhoff. (S1, E11)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Mecha-Streisand: Cartman and Kyle fall out over a magic triangle they un-earth on an archaeological dig. The triangle yields the power to turn Barbra Streisand into a terrible monster. (S1, E12)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is A Dirty S**t (1): Dr. Mephisto helps Cartman un-cover the truth about his dad's identity. The spotlight is on quite a few of South Park's male residents. Who could it be? (S1, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is Still A Dirty S**t (2): Dr Mephisto is shot before he reveals who Cartman's father is. Who exactly shot him? Meanwhile, the rest of the town try to deal with a blizzard. (S2, E02)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Barbrady resigns, anarchy ensues and the boys pitch in to help.

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Ike's Wee Wee: Kyle misunderstands what circumcision is and thinks he has to save Ike's penis from being cut off! Mr. Mackey is fired, and turns to drugs - "drugs are bad, m'kay?" (S2, E04)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Conjoined Fetus Lady: Kyle is terrified because he has to see the school nurse, who has a scary deformity. Meanwhile, the school dodgeball team goes to China - only Pip can save them now. (S2, E05)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: City On The Edge Of Forever: The school bus ends up perched on the edge of a ravine after it crashes in a snowstorm. Must be time for some flashbacks then! Can these memories be trusted? (S2, E07)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Summer Sucks: The boys' plans for 4th of July celebrations are ruined when the State bans fireworks. It's up to Uncle Jimbo and Ned to save the day with a little trip down Meheeco way. (S2, E08)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls: The Sundance Film Festival is in South Park but it's not long before Hollywood culture is over running the town and polluting the sewer where Mr Hankey lives. (S2, E09)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Chickenpox: The boys are sent to Kenny's for the night, so they can all get chickenpox. The boys decide to get even on their parents by hiring a prostitute with mouth herpes to infect them. (S2, E10)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off The Fatty Foods: The boys are taken to the planetarium but Cartman has other ideas and decides to audition to sing the Cheesy Poofs song on their next advert. (S2, E11)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Clubhouses: Stan and Kyle build a clubhouse, so they can play truth or dare with Wendy and Bebe. Cartman and Kenny decide to build their own rival clubhouse based on The Ewoks Village. (S2, E12)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cow Days: The boys try to win Terrance and Phillip dolls at the carnival but a dodgy carnie keeps changing the rules - time to call "shenanigans"! Cartman dates Leonardo DiCaprio. (S2, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Chef Aid: Chef realises that Alanis Morissette's (fictional) hit song "Stinky Britches" is a song that he wrote years ago but the record company aren't interested in giving him any credit. (S2, E14)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Spooky Fish: When Stan is given a fish by his Aunt, he has a feeling there's something not quite right about it. Sure enough it's not long before there's evil goings on. (In spooky vision!) (S2, E15)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Merry Christmas, Charlie Manson!: Cartman's Uncle Howard escapes from prison with another inmate, Charlie Manson. The boys want to go see Mr Hankey at the mall but no one will take them. (S2, E16)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Gnomes (a.k.a. Underpants Gnomes): The boys must write an essay for school. Tweek suggests they write about gnomes that visit him every night and steal his pants. What will they discover? (S2, E17)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Rainforest Schmainforest: The boys go to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the "Getting Gay With Kids" choir tour, but Cartman is on a mission to cause havoc. Jennifer Aniston guests. (S3, E01)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Spontaneous Combustion: The citizens of South Park are randomly exploding and it's up to Stan to find the cause. Kyle discovers his dad is having problems with erectile dysfunction. (S3, E02)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The Succubus (a.k.a. Chef's Mama): The boys discover that Chef has a new girl who has changed him from a free-spirited, soul-singing hipster to that of a mediocre, religious paper pusher. (S3, E03)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jakovasaurs: While camping, the boys discover the last two Jakovasaurs (a parody of Jar Jar Binks) on the planet. Will the townsfolk welcome them with open arms or find them very annoying? (S3, E04)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tweek vs. Craig: The boys coerce two of their classmates, Tweek and Craig, into a schoolyard fight. Craig learns martial arts with the aid of Cartman. Tweek is taught to box by Uncle Jimbo. (S3, E05)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Sexual Harassment Panda: After a school educational talk from Petey the Panda, Cartman decides to sue Stan for sexual harassment. Suing fever starts to grip the entire town! (S3, E06)

programme.desc: Kate rebuffs Shane's morning-after advances, Maeve prepares for her first day at Trinity College and the Raw staff seeks to recover from the robbery.

programme.desc: When they return home to find the flat wrecked by Jojo's impromptu house party, Kate tells Shane it's high time his sister moved out.

programme.title: Raw S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Anthony is offered a job that conflicts with Jojo’s position at Raw. Kate bristles at Shane and Zoe's budding relationship and Fiona realizes that there is more to Max.

programme.title: Raw S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tanya's husband Mal goes back to his old ways and Geoff threatens to leave unless he gets a raise.

programme.title: Raw S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The whole restaurant is in shock when a customer suddenly falls ill. Meanwhile, Fiona's past catches up to her and Cupid's bow threatens to strike Jojo.

programme.title: Raw S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Wracked with guilt since she slept with Bobby, Jojo must choose between him and Dylan. Meanwhile, Shane struggles to cope with his parents' separation and Pavel's romance.

programme.title: Raw S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: With Jojo suffering a raging hangover and Fiona gone from the restaurant, it's up to Geoff to keep the show on the road.

programme.title: Raw S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: As Kate prepares for the opening of her pop-up shop, Jojo has second thoughts about walking out on Raw for her dream honeymoon.

programme.title: Raw S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Shane has to make some hard choices when his wife finally tracks him down. Meanwhile, an old rival provides an unlikely answer to Tanya and Mal's problems.

programme.title: Raw S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Pavel delivers devastating news to Geoff. Meanwhile, Jojo discovers Dylan's secret past.

programme.title: Raw S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jojo and Dylan enjoy their new status as an engaged couple, but Maeve nearly pushes Jojo over the edge while pressing her to plan a traditional white wedding.

programme.title: Raw S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jojo finds it tough to put mistakes behind her while enduring Kate's jibes, Maeve's concerns and Geoff's favoritism towards his new protégé.

programme.title: Raw S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Fiona is thrilled by Geoff's return, but is surprised when Geoff chooses to keep Max at the restaurant.

programme.title: Raw S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Geoff refuses to go public with his relationship with Pavel. Meanwhile, Jojo is furious with Bobby when she discovers that Rebecca has moved into their flat.

programme.title: Raw S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Bobby and Dylan realize their dream, but Geoff has the birthday from hell. Fiona delivers a blow to Paul and the party descends into violence.

programme.title: Raw S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Fed up with Maeve's meddling, Jojo pushes the wedding date forward to two weeks. Meanwhile, Ray and Fiona continue their affair and Dr. Jack asks Pavel to join him in Brazil.

programme.title: Raw S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Pavel returns to help out on the busiest day in the restaurant calendar: Valentine's Day. Meanwhile, Geoff and Fiona are at a breaking point with Jojo.

programme.title: Raw S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It's the anniversary of Pavel's death, but Geoff spurns the support of friends and family. Meanwhile, Shane loses money put aside for staff wages to a con artist.

programme.title: Raw S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tanya's sister chooses the restaurant for her wedding venue, and Mal's father-in-law is bent on making trouble.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Bartlett Finchley's paranoia about the machines around proves true.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Seeking refuge from a storm, traveler David Ellington comes upon a bizarre hermitage of monks, who have imprisoned a man who begs for his help. When David confronts the head monk Brother Jerome, he is told that the man is the devil, and David must decide

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A young woman lying in a hospital bed, her head wrapped in bandages, awaits the outcome of a surgical procedure performed by the State in a last-ditch attempt to make her look 'normal'.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds stopping in a small town are trapped by their own superstition when playing a fortune-telling machine in a local diner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The daughter of an inventor objects to their 'perfect' home where they are waited on by mechanical servants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: A nostalgic actor revisits his late wife and friends at their old haunt, only to find that he is now out of place there.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: When three dum-dum crooks get ahold of a camera that takes pictures of the future, they set out to make a quick fortune with their new toy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: After a derelict Santa Claus is fired on Christmas Eve, he finds a mysterious bag that gives out presents. With this bag, he sets out to fulfill his one wish - to see the less fortunate inherit the bounties of Christmas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In a tragic, western town, a desperate father begs for clemency as his son is slated to die for an accident he could not have prevented.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: At a prominent club in Washington, D.C., a socialite argues about whether it would be possible to change history by traveling back in time. When he leaves the club he finds himself in 1865, on the night that President Lincoln will be shot.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: A used car salesman buys a car that dooms him to tell only the truth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: When a woman investigates a clamor on the roof of her rural house, she discovers a small UFO and little aliens emerging from it. Or so it seems.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Gaining telepathic abilities when his coin lands on its edge bank clerk Hector B. Poole learns about the difference between other people's plans and fantasies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: While in the hospital recovering from overwork, Liz Powell keeps dreaming about going down to the hospital morgue.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Passing through the sound barrier a commercial airliner inadvertently travels back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: A timid vacuum-cleaner salesman is given the strength of 300 men by some experimenting aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 20
programme.desc: An old radio is taking bitter bachelor Ed Lindsay back to a happier time before what he considers worthless tripe on television when he starts picking up radio programs from the 1930's and 1940's.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 21
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler cajoles his friend to use his telekinesis to affect the results of the gambling tables in Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 22
programme.desc: A toy telephone becomes the link between a young boy and his dead grandmother.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 23
programme.desc: A pioneer from a wagon train in 1847 sets off to find something for his ill son and stumbles into present-day New Mexico.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 24
programme.desc: After successfully stealing a gold shipment, a group of criminals and their scientist accomplice put themselves in suspended animation in a remote desert cave. When they awaken decades later, complications ensue when their truck is destroyed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Annoyed by a club member's constant chatter, a man bets him he cannot remain silent for a year, living in a glass enclosure in the club basement.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 26
programme.desc: Adam Grant is trapped in a recurring nightmare, in which he is sentenced to death and executed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 27
programme.desc: Using the power of mind over matter, Archibald Beechcroft remakes the world to his own specifications.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 28
programme.desc: Following a frantic phone call about a crashed spaceship, two policemen try and determine who among the passengers of a bus at a snowed-in roadside diner is from another world.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 29
programme.desc: In a future totalitarian society, a librarian is declared obsolete and sentenced to death.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A man and a woman, on opposite sides of a future war, encounter each other in a deserted town.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: A plane lands safely, but the pilot, crew and all of its passengers are missing!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: On the road home from the Civil War, a Confederate soldier stops at a burned-out house and gets to know the owner, a recent widow.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Championship pool player Fats Brown returns from the grave for one last game.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: After a poor but ambitious Central American farm worker overthrows his country's tyrannical leader, he believes he sees assassins everywhere. A look in the mirror reveals his most dangerous enemy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Before he died, notorious gunslinger Pinto Sykes put a curse on hired-gun Conny Miller. Miller returns to town and is challenged to visit the grave of Sykes, despite the curse.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Little Anthony Fremont controls an entire town with his ability to read minds and make people do as he wishes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: A former Nazi SS Captain returns to the ruins of a concentration camp to reminisce and is met by one of his victims.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Confederacy scout Sgt. Joseph Paradine finds a town full of Union soldiers, and an old man who claims he used witchcraft to paralyze them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Alan Richards plans to build a dam in Africa on a tribe's ancestral land. The tribe's witch doctor puts a curse on him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Woodrow, a janitor living in the year 1890, accidentally activates a time traveling helmet which transports him to 1962 - then promptly breaks down.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: A hobo, clown, bagpipe player, ballerina and military officer are trapped in a huge cylinder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: A gung-ho young soldier gets a new viewpoint on war when he inexplicably changes places with a Japanese officer trying to stop his superior from leading a charge against American forces.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: A lonely old woman refuses to leave her apartment for fear of meeting "Mr. Death."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Paul Radin has invited three people to join him in his bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 18
programme.desc: A vagrant steps into a murdered gangster's expensive shoes and is taken over by the dead man's ghost, who vows to remain on Earth to seek revenge against his killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 19
programme.desc: On a hunting trip, Hyder Simpson and his dog Rip dive into a lake after a raccoon. When he gets home he finds that no one can see or hear him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Actor Rance McGrew makes TV Westerns for a living, but he's a lousy actor and a worse cowboy. Despite that, each week he "wins" against the bad guys. Finally, the bad guys have had enough and decide to teach McGrew a lesson.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan and a headstrong attorney (Piper Laurie) investigate a drive-by shooting at a high school.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's daughter (Stacy Van Dyke) escapes from her abusive husband---a trucker who turns up murdered.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The head pediatric nurse is an ex-prostitute whose former madam is murdered after revealing that she's going to publish a tell-all book.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan searches for clues to solve the decades-old murder of his mentor at the hospital.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan recruits his friend Ben Matlock (Andy Griffith) to defend Jesse, who's accused of the murder of a resident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Conclusion. With Jesse falsely accused, Ben Matlock (Andy Griffith) pieces together the evidence to find the real killer of Eric Spindler.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Mike Connors reprises his former role as tough-guy PI Joe Mannix, who gets assistance from Dr. Sloan to tackle an unsolved 1973 murder case.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: The investigation of a country star's murder revolves around a driven TV producer (Barbara Mandrell) and her daughter, a timid songwriter.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: A psychiatrist murders his estranged wife and frames a patient for the crime.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 20
programme.desc: A sultry but sinister pharmaceutical rep is dead set on winning the heart of the hospital's chief of staff.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 21
programme.desc: A beach boy involved with a gang member's sister is a suspect in his murder.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 22
programme.desc: A surgeon (Wayne Rogers) drops dead while he's operating on another doctor (Jack Klugman).

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 23
programme.desc: A pilot of an airliner carrying Dr. Sloan and Amanda to a medical conference in Europe is murdered.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 24
programme.desc: A wealthy woman and her lover concoct an elaborate scheme to do in her husband.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 25
programme.desc: A comedian (Tim Conway) makes a bumbling attempt to do in his more successful former partner (Harvey Korman)---whose wife turns up dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 26
programme.desc: A mad bomber whom Dr. Sloan helped put away has escaped and wants the good doctor blown away.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Steve becomes embroiled in political intrigue after the murder of a city councilman's wife appears to be part of a larger political strategy.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mark investigates when her older lover, a new state Supreme Court Justice, murders a teenage girl.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A Malibu Hills fire is the backdrop for rising tensions between the residents; a disgraced stockbroker, a naturalist, a worried father, and a land developer. A worried Dr. Sloan deals with his own parental fears when Steve helps fight the fire.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Community General is already under increased security, with a high-profile criminal hospitalized, when an important businesswoman is brought in. Mark suspects her security guard has deadly intentions.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Jesse's new part-time job as a trainer of the pro basketball Mustangs turns deadly when he's accused of murdering a star player.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan investigates a plastic surgeon when an actress's death apparently results from an infection contracted during surgery.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Mark and Amanda are assigned to the task force investigating an airplane crash. An adversarial FBI agent and Russian mobsters make their assignment more difficult.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Steve and Ron lead the chase for the stolen nuclear material.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The Sloans run into plenty of industry politics when they investigate the death of television network executive, Rachel Woodrall. Seamy revelations about Woodrall's college sorority lead to the killer.

programme.desc: The three remaining designers are challenged to create a 12-piece collection to show Bryant Park.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 39
programme.desc: Once again the contestants are divided into red and blue teams for an offsite challenge. Tonight, they need to prepare canapÃ©s for the launch of the Martini Club at the luxurious Observatory Hotel in the heart of Sydney.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 40
programme.desc: Who was the weakest link in the Martini Club challenge? One person must leave MasterChef Australia for good, and it's up to the losing team to cast their votes.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 41
programme.desc: Gary and George take over the Kitchen for another night of cooking lessons. Fetta Blini with Smoked Beetroot and Roasted John Dory as well as a mouth-watering homemade vanilla ice cream.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 42
programme.desc: First up tonight, the tropical themed mystery box, which contains kingfish, pineapple, rum, coconut and sweet potato. The winning contestant gets the right to choose the key ingredients in the night's big test, the invention challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 43
programme.desc: The bottom three from last night's Invention Challenge now face the Pressure Test. They must each create a salmon terrine. While they're competing against each other, these three are also among the closest friends in the house.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 44
programme.desc: Tonight, Matt Moran steps up to the hotplate. Famed for the prestigious Aria restaurant, he's been a two hat" chef for the last 8 years. Both he and the winning contestant will cook a poached pear tart."

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 45
programme.desc: In this special episode, the competitors get their biggest taste yet of real-world pressure in the kitchen, as they cater a wedding dinner. With just 24-hours notice, the pressure is on. Worse still, the wedding is on a boat with only a tiny galley.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 46
programme.desc: With no more red and blue team, elimination voting is over. The bottom two performers will compete against each other in a taste off, taking it in turns to list ingredients in a dish one at a time. The first person to miss an ingredient will be sent home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 47
programme.desc: It's the cook's night off again, and the chefs are back in the kitchen. Tonight Gary and George demonstrate King Fish Skewers, Baklava, Raspberry Flan, and to top it off, how to mix a killer Pina Colada.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 48
programme.desc: In a spectacular week of challenges, MasterChef Australia goes to Hong Kong, giving the remaining contestants the cooking experience of a lifetime. The group arrive at the Langham Place Hotel's Michelin star restaurant for their first challenge: Dim Sum.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 49
programme.desc: Three contestants take to the water & find themselves on Lamma Island and in a local fishing village, the challenge is killing & cooking their catch as the locals would. Meanwhile, the remaining two contestants are surprised with a high society challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 50
programme.desc: World famous chef Donovan Cook joins the MasterChef Australia team for one extraordinary challenge. The winner of the Lamma Island challenge takes on Donovan's prime protÃ©gÃ© Pak for one of the most high pressured celebrity chef challenges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 51
programme.desc: Its reds against blues, and the contestants sights, smells, tastes and techniques are given the ultimate test as they compete in a high octane super challenge around Hong Kong.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 52
programme.desc: The super challenge losers cook off in a duck stir fry pressure test and with just 30 minutes to complete their dish, its anyones guess as to who is going home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 53
programme.desc: In a special Hong Kong masterclass, Gary and George showcase some of the best dishes from the week. On the menu Braised pork belly and scallops, fried rice, pizza, and lemon and date scones.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 54
programme.desc: Fresh from Hong Kong, the final four contestants in the house are back to the MasterChef Kitchen, and the familiar sight of the Mystery Box. Among the ingredients, beef mince, capsicum, lasagne sheets, and yoghurt.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 55
programme.desc: In a series twist, no-one will go home tonight. Instead of a pressure test, all contestants are cooking for the chance to meet and dine with three winners of the coveted Chef of the Year" award."

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 56
programme.desc: Sunday night's winner cooks off against world renowned Belgian chef, Emmanuel Stroobant, famous for his Saint Pierre restaurant in Singapore.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 57
programme.desc: In one of the most ambitious off site challenges, the contestants board HMAS Kanimbla for a task that is going to require a full team of them to succeed. They will be cooking lunch for 200 hungry sailors, using produce from the ships pantry.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 58
programme.desc: Tonight the bottom two performers from the Navy Challenge face off in a taste test. The loser will be eliminated. On the menu, Georges mums traditional Greek Moussaka.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 59
programme.desc: Tonight, Gary and George work their magic on lamb shanks, beef kofta, double backed cheese soufflÃ© and crepe suzette.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 60
programme.desc: In the mystery box challenge, contestants have to make their own sausages. There's chaos in the kitchen as they get to grips with turning a slab of meat into their own snag. None have used a sausage maker before, and it's not as easy as it looks.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 61
programme.desc: The two bottom from last nights Invention Challenge face a Pressure Test. On the menu, perhaps the most complex and difficult dish so far; a pannacotta with macaroons, ganache and a passionfruit slick.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 62
programme.desc: Celebrity chef Adrian Richardson, from Melbourne's La Luna restaurant goes up against the MasterChef winning contestant tonight.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 63
programme.desc: The contestants have $100 to buy ingredients and then race against the clock to create a dish that they hope will impress the panel, consisting of some of the founders of Australian cuisine.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 64
programme.desc: Today, the bottom two performers compete for their lives as they engage in the sudden death Taste Test. One wrong guess and they're going home. Tonight, the dish is Gary's Sri Lankan Curry.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 65
programme.desc: Gary and George take the competitors through the Friday night cooking lesson. On the menu this week: sausages with red wine reduction; Greek style baked beans; roast salmon and pancetta; and chocolate and nut cigars.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 66
programme.desc: Just six contestants have made it to the final week. From 7500 people who originally auditioned, one of these six will become Australia's first MasterChef. In the first of the week's high pressured challenges, the contestants must cook on a budget of $10.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: With the first challenge involving heights and blindfolds and the second requiring all their strength, everyone is pushed to the edge, except one Survivor who appears to be throwing the game!

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Things get a bit panicked around the camps with all Survivors feeling their necks on the line, but an unexpected setback at the challenge will turn the whole game on its head.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The first challenge consists of a series of temptations. What will the hungry Survivors fall for? And one Survivor makes sure that if they're going down,they're going down in flames!

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: We are well and truly down to an individual game now and this time around, the prize is a brand new car. What lengths will the Survivors go to get their hands on the keys?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: he Survivors enter one of the biggest Tribal Councils of the season as an unexpected move turns the game on its head.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: An unlikely duo battle it out in an endurance challenge. All sorts of names are being thrown up for the Tribal Council vote, but the name that keeps coming up the most is one you won't expect.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: The individual game gets desperate with several Survivors sneaking around camp searching for the idol that will save their game. Secrets aren't staying safe leading into a high-drama Tribal Council!

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Storms roll over camp and dampen all moods. As we inch closer towards the pointy end of things, old alliances are starting to crack as everyone starts to fight hard for their place in the game.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 20
programme.desc: When two of the biggest warriors in the game go head-to-head, a hard-fought battle ends in tears. And it's a brutal Tribal Council where some hard truths are laid on the line.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 21
programme.desc: The Survivors dive into some of the heaviest game play of the season. Loyalties fly out the window and old alliances are broken as each Survivor tries desperately to keep their place in the tribe.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 22
programme.desc: No-one is safe at this point in the game, leaving all contestants desperate to get their hands on the Immunity necklace to buy themselves another day in camp.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 23
programme.desc: With the end in sight, every move the contestants make could be the difference between making the final three or being voted out of the game.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 24
programme.desc: On the last day, the final two contestants head to their last Tribal Council where they have to convince the Jury that they deserve the title of Sole Survivor.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The best competition on TV is bigger than ever. The biggest villains, game players and heroes, are seeking redemption and competing against each other in the first ever Australian Survivor: All Stars.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Proving it's game on, things heat up between tribe mates, with new alliances being formed while others are kept in the dark. An intense Tribal Council sees a much loved character say goodbye.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: They don't call it All Stars for nothing, and this episode proves just how cutthroat Survivor royalty can be with the most epic Tribal Council the show has seen.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When both tribes meet at the reward challenge, what they're fighting for isn't what it seems to the disappointment of the winning tribe.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: With a romance sparking between two tribe mates, will a power couple be formed and hold strong as the game progresses?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Needing to pull together to ensure success reward and immunity wins, both tribes put their differences aside and fight a hard fight to win.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: An unexpected call means James has to choose between his best mates and Holly. Gary has another threesome and a night out trying to forget about Gary ends in disaster for Charlotte. (S3, ep6)

programme.desc: After a fun filled summer in Cancun the Geordie Shore gang are back with a bang! With two new spaces in the house, it can only mean one thing, fresh meat for the family!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 404
programme.desc: The Geordie Shore house is a far from happy place with Vicky and Sophie still not talking and the rest of the house caught in the divide... it's stormy seas ahead at the Shore.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 405
programme.desc: Peace has finally been restored in the house now that Vicky and Sophie have made up, but nothing lasts forever and when Ricci sees red on a family night out, disaster strikes.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 406
programme.desc: It's James' birthday and the gang plan a surprise trip to Dublin to celebrate with a secret guest, but on their return their high is brought down by Ricci's return with some bad news.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 407
programme.desc: With Ricci gone from the Geordie Shore house, the rest of the gang are determined to keep Vicky's spirits up and the boys decide that what better way than a walk on the wild side - camping!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 501
programme.desc: The Geordie Shore gang are back in a pimped up pad and ready to cause chaos once again. (S5, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 502

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 503

programme.desc: Charlotte returns to the Geordie Shore house just in time to join the rest of the gang on a Geordie Tour of Barcelona. Our favourite Geordies bathe in the Spanish sun, sea, sex and sangria.

programme.desc: The Geordies are back where they belong, in Newcastle, for a jaw-dropping summer season of partying, pulling, bucking, necking on and getting mortal. (S7, ep1)

programme.desc: Charlotte has an embarrassing accident which results in a trip to the mattress shop. Charlotte must tell her mam and Lauren some big news about her and Josh, but how will they react? (S3, ep3)

programme.desc: Charlotte comes out of surgery after having her breast implants removed, but it looks like recovery will be slow and painful. It's Charlotte's birthday and she and Josh have a joint party. (S3, ep8)

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: As Lauren Conrad juggles fashion school, a demanding internship and an unpredictable roommate who sabotages her work event, she learns quickly that everything is bigger in Los Angeles, including her problems.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren deals with the fallout of Heidi crashing the Teen Vogue party. When Heidi lands an interview for a 'dream job' that leads her to consider ditching school, permanently, Lauren realizes that she and Heidi may be on different paths.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Teen Vogue sends Lauren on an overnight errand that lands her in New York City and returns to LA only to find a major surprise from her past waiting for her.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When an ex-boyfriend reappears in Lauren's life, she is surprised to see she might not be as over him as she thought. Meanwhile at her new job, Heidi asks if the price of paying her dues is worth the cost.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Lauren races home from an all-day Teen Vogue event to be with Jason on his birthday, but the night doesn't turn out as she expected. Audrina seeks Heidi's advice for her latest date with model/actor, Danny.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Jason becomes a mounting distraction in Lauren's professional and academic life. Heidi finally gets her big chance to work in the nightclubs, but it couldn't have come at a worse time.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's the gang's first Holiday in LA and not everyone gets what they wish for. A New Year's kiss proves hard to come by for Lauren when Jason finds out she got an unexpected call from an old flame.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Jason wants to make Lauren's 20th birthday special but when she lies to him about working with male models for a Teen Vogue assignment their relationship is put to the test.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Heidi finally decides she's had enough drama with Jordan. When she turns to the girls for advice, she realizes what she has to do to. With their fighting days behind them, Lauren and Jason think about taking things to the next level.

programme.desc: When Lauren's hard work at LA Fashion Week leads to a career opportunity of a lifetime, she is torn between her job and her boyfriend. Whitney says goodbye to LA for the summer, and Heidi and Audrina look forward to being single in the city.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After a rocky summer with her boyfriend Jason, Lauren decides to break it off and returns to Teen Vogue to face her unhappy boss. Heidi finds herself in trouble with a guy both she and Audrina are dating.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren goes on her first date since Jason and is tested at work when she's asked to work a fashion show. Heidi has a life changing secret she must tell her boyfriend.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When an uninvited Audrina shows up at Heidi's birthday, she learns Heidi's not ready to forgive and forget. Lauren, determined to focus on work, falls for the charms of the new guy in her life, Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Audrina tells Heidi about Spencer's cheating ways, but Heidi is doubtful - until she sees it for herself. Lauren continues to wonder whether she is ready for a relationship.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Heidi takes a break Spencer but finds herself missing him more than she'd like. Lauren has to plan a Teen Vogue dinner but takes a backseat to super-intern Emily from New York.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When Lauren tells Heidi what she really thinks about Spencer, Heidi must choose between her best friend and her boyfriend.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lauren realizes she can't trust her best friends after Heidi hooks Jen up with Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Audrina takes Lauren out on blind double date, while Lauren and Heidi grow farther apart.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Spencer asks Heidi to move in with him but Heidi doesn't know what to do or how to tell her roommate, Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Lauren's 21st birthday is full of surprises when Heidi and Audrina throw her a party.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: With a new job on the line, Whitney stumbles in her biggest opportunity with Teen Vogue.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In this season finale, tension comes to a head as Heidi makes her final decision about moving in with Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Lauren doesn't go to Heidi and Spencer's housewarming party.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren and Heidi grow even farther apart when Spencer asks Heidi to marry him.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Lauren tries to help Audrina decide if Justin is boyfriend material.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Heidi takes her fiancé Spencer to meet her family in Colorado.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Heidi's social circle shrinks as Spencer breaks up with Brody for hanging out with Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lauren gets a blast from the past when her ex-boyfriend Jason calls.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lauren's feelings for Jason are rekindled, but when they run into Heidi and Spencer, tempers flare.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Lauren is shocked to learn that Jason has a girlfriend, but Jason has a bigger surprise for her.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The gang celebrates Brody's birthday in Vegas and Audrina's boyfriend causes a rift in her friendship with Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Jen Bunney tells Lauren that Brody started the rumors about her, but Brody blames on Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Lauren starts a new romance with a male model, but realizes she still has feelings for Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 12

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 13

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Mark King, President and CEO of TaylorMade Golf Company, the largest manufacturer of golf equipment and apparel in the world, is forced to break cover when an employee grows suspicious of her new trainee.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Chad Hallock, CEO and Co-Founder of Budget Blinds, the largest window coverings franchise in North America with more than 800 franchise locations, takes it personally when two separate franchisees criticize his advertising plan.

programme.desc: A report on the death of 50-year-old Kathy Augustine, a career politician from Nevada. Questions arose about the cause of her death after police received a tip that she may have been poisoned, and toxicology reports further confirmed it.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 41
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 69
programme.desc: A report on the murder of housewife Toni Heartsong, killed in her Jupiter, Florida home on in 2000. Her husband was initially eliminated as a possible suspect, but in 2006, new DNA technology revealed the presence of his blood under Toni's thumbnail.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 53
programme.desc: A report on the September 3, 2006 disappearance of Nina Reiser, a Russian doctor who had married Hans Reiser, an American computer whiz. Their marriage began to fall apart and Nina began an affair with Sean Sturgeon, Hans' best friend.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 51
programme.desc: In 2003, Jeanne Callahan waited for her husband, Stephen Trantel, to return home from a day of fishing. Hours later, she received a call telling her that Stephen was under arrest -- police told Jeanne that Stephen had committed ten bank robberies.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 57
programme.desc: A report about Charla and Darren Mack, a married, childless couple who were swingers who liked to attend group sex parties. After their daughter Erika was born, Charla was no longer interested in swinging and their marriage began to crumble.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 43
programme.desc: A report on the 1993 murder of Dr. Linda Goudey in Stoneham, Massachusetts. At the time she was dating Dr. Timothy Stryker, who depending on whom you believe, is either a calculating murderer or an innocent man.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A New York townhouse goes up in flames, and the evidence points to a band of revolutionaries who want to kill police. Investigators conduct a nationwide manhunt to track down the underground group.

programme.title: Who The Bleep Did I Marry? S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: On May 19, 1992, Mary Jo Buttafuoco's life changed forever. Shot point blank in the head by her husband's teenage lover.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: A mysterious kingpin emerges from the shadows of the dark net, willing to stop at nothing to protect his multibillion-dollar online empire, the Silk Road. What will it take to find this man?

programme.title: Who The Bleep Did I Marry? S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Kathi Spiars met a man going by the name of Steve Marcum. But after twelve years of marriage, Kathi discovered something no wife ever wants to know about her husband, records of theft and murder.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Four men flying over a remote African escarpment crash, leaving three of them seriously injured.

programme.title: Who The Bleep Did I Marry? S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Carolyn Cox and her husband Billy seemed like a perfect couple. No one in town suspected that she had been hiding decades of abuse at the hands of her husband.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Bram is hunting with his father when he decides to strike out alone, but is soon attacked by a bear.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: While hiking solo, a former soldier is hit by a series of avalanches and shatters his hip and femur. He must drag himself to safety.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Aspiring actress Vicki Morgan is bludgeoned to death with a baseball bat by her roommate. After he confesses to the cops, it seems like an open and shut case. But things quickly take a turn.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: White rage drives a young man to murder nine black churchgoers in Charleston, SC, in 2015 and fuels a vicious bomb plot to kill Muslim refugees in Kansas. Authorities want to know where it will end.

programme.title: Who The Bleep Did I Marry? S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: At last Ana Margarita Martinez's love has come along. Little does she know that this man and husband of one year has a dark secret.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Panic blankets an Alabama town when a couple is brutally murdered and a father and son are executed. Police are shocked to find that one was buried alive.

programme.title: Who The Bleep Did I Marry? S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Jim and Dina McGreevey were living a model life as the Governor and First Lady of New Jersey. However, Dina was shocked to discover the reason behind his secretive schedule.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The Stocking Strangler, a serial killer who brutally rapes and murders his victims, is caught and sentenced to death in Georgia. Vanity Fair writer David Rose uncovers shocking facts about the case.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: A series of savage murders in Texas, some believe motivated by hate, leaves communities wondering what will stop the killers in their tracks.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bikram Yoga is considered the world's most popular yoga, yet several women claim its founder, Bikram Choudhury, sexually harassed and assaulted them. How did he allegedly go from healer to predator?

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The daughter of a Peruvian political candidate disappears after a night out in Lima, Peru. The man she was last seen alive with is linked to the disappearance of young American woman 3,000 miles away.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: She's the first lady of Scientology, the wife of the Church's leader. After Shelly Miscavige disappears from public view the public and some of the Church's former insiders want to know what happened.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: John E. Robinson was a master of deceit who led a sinister secret life. He was a con man who called himself the slave master. No one in his life had any idea just how vicious his crimes were.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: It is her Hollywood dream come true. A woman is in entangled with a brooding leading man and the son of a world-famous actor. Did one of the men she loved murder her in cold blood?

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Follow the story of America's most wanted Runaway Doctor. Dr. Weinberger's true story is a dark and twisted tale of greed and power that leaves his wife in tears and an entire town in horror.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In 1980, a brutal serial killer abducts women from downtown Los Angeles and dumps their bodies in bizarre places. When an unidentified caller telephones police, they must decipher fact from fiction.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Young cult author J.T. LeRoy's meteoric rise to literary stardom is truly remarkable. But it seems like the more books he sells, the more bizarre his behavior becomes. Is it too much fame too soon?

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: VF Confidential brings you deep into the criminal affairs of various people whose stories were once across the pages of Vanity Fair Magazine.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S4 Ep. 1

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Skydiving in Costa Rica goes horribly wrong for Will when freak weather hurls his plane into the sea.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Two men convicted of abducting and killing a 10-year-old girl are sentenced to death. Both men maintain their innocence and a race to identify the real killer begins before an execution date is set.

programme.title: Who The Bleep Did I Marry? S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Donna Anderson is smitten with an Australian entrepreneur and after a three day romance the two marry within six months.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Two women disappear from an elite college town. Panic pervades the community when their bodies are found. What sinister secrets will police uncover as two families galvanize the public to help?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S7 Ep. 1
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS investigates the entire town of Alexandria, Louisiana, where paranormal activity seems to lurk around every corner.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Mt. Pleasant, South Carolina to help the USS Yorktown's crew figure out if the paranormal activity they are experiencing points to their fallen heroes.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S9 Ep. 5
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Louisville, Kentucky to investigate one of the oldest operating steamboats in the United States, The Belle of Louisville.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S7 Ep. 24
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to Hartford, CT to Elks Lodge, the oldest and largest secret fraternal organizations in the country. Elks Lodge #19 is shrouded in mystery and tragedy with a gruesome death hanging over its head....and decades of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on a mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S4 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S9 Ep. 14
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS is called to Shreveport, Louisiana where the employees and owner of the Rendall Building are experiencing terrifying paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The TAPS team braves the wintery waters of the Atlantic to investigate Star Island off of the coast of Portsmouth, NH.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S7 Ep. 6
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Mission Point Resort on Mackinac Island. Constructed in the 1950's as a summer destination, it becomes nearly deserted in the winter time, and perfect for the team to investigate.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Boulder City, Nevada to investigate Boulder City Hospital.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S5 Ep. 15
programme.desc: This week TAPS heads to Thousand Island, NY to investigate a 4-acre private island and is joined by the \\" King of Rock and Roll\\" himself, Meatloaf.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S10 Ep. 10
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS has been called to investigate Southern Vermont College in Bennington, Vermont. The legend of a mysterious love triangleand suicidescould be at the root of frightening paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S7 Ep. 11
programme.desc: We pick were we last left off, in Hawaii, for the reveal. Jason and Grant were called back for a very important personal case, the Reid House, in Rhode Island, to help a scared 4 year old.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S5 Ep. 19
programme.desc: This week TAPS answers the Wrights begging call heads to Manitou Springs, Colorado to investigate the Briarhurst Manor located at the base of Pike's Peak.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S11 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The historic Old Lake County Jail was once considered to be inescapable... until notorious gangster John Dillinger, escaped from it in 1934. Over 80 years later, aggressive prisoners are breaking free as sealed areas.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S4 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S8 Ep. 16
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS revisits a familiar city, Alexandria, Louisiana, but this time, they're there to investigate the Alexandria Zoo.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The TAPS team answers a call from a family in Blackstone, Massachusetts being plagued by a demonic entity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Fort Ticonderoga,located in upstate New York,is being haunted by the dead from three nationsand needs help from the TAPS team.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S8 Ep. 17
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Oswego, New York to investigate the renowned Fort Ontario. TAPS has investigated many forts, but never one that once served as a sanctuary for Jewish refugees during World War II.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S6 Ep. 24
programme.desc: The Ghost Hunters enlist the help of Bravo's The Real Housewives of Atlanta as they embark on this week's investigation.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The site of the bloodiest battle of the Revolutionary War sets the stage for an unforgettable investigation by TAPS.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S10 Ep. 9
programme.desc: TAPS investigates Houghton Mansionin North Adams, Massachusetts where the repercussions of a deadly car accident could be behind unexplained phenomena on the property.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S7 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The TAPS team has been called out to investigate Hill View Manor in New Castle, Pennsylvania. Once a nursing facility, this now abandoned building is fraught with paranormal activity that allegedly stems from the violent deaths of former patients.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, Tony returns to one of his favourite places on Earth, Vietnam.He journeys to a city he has never been to, Hu?, The City of Ghosts.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Detroit holds a unique place in American history. Few cities have seen such a dramatic rise and fall from economic boom to disparity. Tony explores the past, present and future of the Motor City.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A country of only six million people where a vast percentage of the land is steaming hot jungle or a huge scrub desert known simply as The Chaco. This is one of the least known nations in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Tony dives into the ever-changing state of Punjab, India. Starting off his journey in Amritsar, Tony is immediately struck by the chaos around him.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we leave behind Africa we’ve come to know in the news. Instead, we embrace the wild, untamed land of mystery, adventure, and exoticism; Zanzibar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, we first visit the city of Glasgow, then we head north into the Scottish Highlands.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony travels to Las Vegas Nevada with his food author friend Michael Ruhlman. Whatever your need, whatever bad behaviour you’d like to display Las Vegas is the place that will allow it... for a price.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: For the first time, Tony visits Budapest, 25 years after democracy planted its flag –alongside the Oscar-winning master of light, cinematographer Vilmos Zsigmond, as one of his key guides.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.desc: In Bulgaria, a species of grasshopper has evolved to outwit one of nature’s best hunters: the bat.

programme.desc: Explore the lives of grey seals as they hunt, eat, sleep, and mate mostly below the ocean's surface.
