programme.desc: After racking up a huge bill at Pumpers, SwaySway and Buhdeuce level up to pay off their debt in 'Diner Ducks', then in 'Switcheroo', things get awkward when the guys eat a loaf of Switcheroo Bread.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Jimmy Neutron AU S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Jimmy heads a world-leading baseball team, and uses his genius Neutronic technology to improve the equipment. Carl and Sheen convince Jimmy to fast forward to old age, because they want to buy a video game that they are technically too young for.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 69
programme.desc: Helga becomes the latest child fashion star and everyone loves her for her scowl and bad attitude. The gang finally gets sick of Arnold's never-ending good advice, so they all decide to stop listening to him altogether.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: A monster storm washes the Beavers out of their dam and strands them in a scary Dixieland bayou.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The Terrible Twosome/App Trap: Poof goes through the terrible twos. Foop goes through the terrific twos. Timmy and his fairies have to survive Poof’s terrible twos.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A record heatwave strikes the city, setting everyone on edge./Arnold wakes to find the city covered in snow and hears that school is closed for the day.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Operation: Ruthless/The Vacant Lot: Arnold decides to get up the nerve to speak with the girl of his dreams, Ruth McDougal, at the annual cheese festival./Arnold and the gang clean up a vacant lot so that they can have a baseball field.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S8 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Meet the Odd Parents: After what seems like forever, Mom and Dad have finally gotten hip to the fact that Timmy has fairy godparents. The question now is: how long can they keep Jorgen in the dark so that he won’t take Wanda, Cosmo and Poof away forever?

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: While on their way to a sports coliseum, Daggett annoys the bus driver who accidentally drives the bus through a hole in the fabric of space and time.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Dinklescouts/I Dream of Cosmo: Timmy wishes Mr. Dinkleberg would replace Dad as Squirrely Scout leader. Dad tries to regain Timmy’s respect and his leader position. Cosmo has amnesia and thinks he’s Dad’s genie.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Helga tries to hide her disappointment at not being invited to Rhonda's makeover party. She gives herself her own makeover and crashes the party with the neighborhood boys in tow, trying to out girlie-girl everyone else at the party.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 62
programme.desc: Dinner for Four/Phoebe Skips: After winning coupons to a fancy French restaurant, Helga attempts to prove to Arnold that she is more sophisticated than Lila. The only problem is, she accidentally goes to the wrong French restaurant.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Helga has been secretly building a shrine in her closet to Arnold. She has been collecting his combs, old school photos, used band-aids and chewing gum, but only one thing will make the shrine complete: Arnold's hat.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Bad Heir Day/Freaks and Greeks: Crocker wants an heir to his supposed "fortune and fame." Poof coincidentally ends up in his care and Crocker is set for life.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: When it looks like Otto will make the cover of Gnarly Surf Magazine, Reggie is angry because the photographer doesn't think girls can surf.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Timmy is sick of all of these veggies so he decides to change all of the healthy food into desserts!/Timmy makes magic "You Doo" dolls to control everyone he knows.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 63
programme.desc: Full Moon/Ms. Pataki, Student-Teacher: When the gang all decide that they are going to "moon" Principal Wartz, Arnold thinks that it''s a bad idea, but ends up inadvertently getting caught and taking the blame. The gang all worry that Arnold will snitch.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: TV's Adam West, star of the superhero series "Catman," never had a real childhood. Timmy wishes that Adam could become a kid again. / Timmy wishes Cosmo and Wanda were Tootie's birthday fairies for the rest of the day.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Fly Boy/Temporary Fairy: Everybody in Dimmsdale is watching the latest horror film, "Fly Boy." But Timmy isn't allowed to, so when he wishes to become a "fly on the wall".

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Lame Ducks/Perfect Nightmare: Dad organizes a neighborhood watch program to catch a neighborhood thief. Timmy wishes he had the perfect family in order to win a contest. Everyone goes crazy trying to be perfect.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 14
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad mistake Cosmo for a ghost and restart their failed ghost-hunting business, Timmy wishes that the fairies would pretend to haunt Dimmsdale.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 65
programme.desc: Big Bob pulls his back and cannot go to a very important meeting. Not knowing who else to send in his place, he asks Helga. / When Arnold discovers that Oskar has been pretending to know how to read, Arnold confronts him.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Girly Squirrely/Birthday Battle: Transmorphers Versus Unicorns: Chloe joins the Squirrely Scouts and saves the troop by helping them get their first merit badge. Timmy and Chloe find out they have the same birthday and compete for the best party.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Norb awakes to find he suffers from the offensive condition of Stinky Toe. Dag embarks on a perilous mission to discover the cure.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Dag discovers annoying your brother isn't much fun when Norb 'bops him into last week' and Dag is forced to retrace his errant steps over and over again with painful results.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Dag and Norb are driven to the height of annoyance when a needy tree lizard, Bing, attaches himself to them and won't leave.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Certifiable Super Sitter: Chloe meets Poof for the first time when he comes home from school on Spring Break. Cosmo and Wanda win a free French Dinner, so Chloe gets to babysit Poof and his friends. All goes well until Vicky shows up.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Norb befriends Stump (an actual tree stump). Despite Dag's jealousy Norb realizes he has not lost a brother, but gained a friend.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 27
programme.desc: The Big Scoop/Harold's Kitty: Arnold and Helga are editors of competing school newspapers. Harold softens when he finds a lost cat and then refuses to give it up to its rightful owner. Arnold eventually persuades Harold to give up the kitty.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Dad changes Timmy’s room into a surveillance center to prove that his kindly neighbor, Dinkleberg, is truly evil. Being the best neighbor ever, Dinkleberg pretends to be evil just to make Dad feel better.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Animal Crockers/One Flu Over the Crocker’s Nest: Chloe wishes that an animal that looks like Mr. Crocker would no longer be endangered. Timmy, Chloe and the fairies go inside Mr. Crocker to destroy the magical Fairy Flu germs Cosmo sneezed on him.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 29
programme.desc: Ransom/Ms. Perfect: When Timberly's doll is kidnapped, Gerald and Arnold track it down. A new classmate is tormented by Helga and the other girls but is eventually accepted.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Helga drops her journal full of love poems about Arnold into a pile of books./ Arnold's class goes on a field trip to the aquarium where Arnold waits to see Lockjaw.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 11
programme.desc: It's "Bring Your Kid to Work Day," and Dad takes Timmy to his office. When Timmy accidentally eats Poof (who is hiding as a marshmallow in Timmy's cereal) Timmy becomes magically talented at soccer.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Cheese and Crockers/Land Before Timmy: Timmy wishes up a machine that allows him to merge with other items to become half-Timmy/half-whatever. Timmy’s tired of technology taking over and ruining his life so he wishes for a simpler world.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Dimmsdale Tales: Dad takes the Squirrely Scouts on a camping trip and forgets all the supplies. Timmy tries to make the most of their trip by telling a collection of scary stories around a campfire.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 77
programme.desc: When Helga realizes that Arnold is so taken by Lila because of her wit and charm, she decides that the only way to get Arnold to notice her is to be like Lila. Arnold helps Mr. Green run for the City Council.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Otto, Sam And Twister agree to sneak out for Mischief Night.The kids think nothing of accidentally destroying Violet's garden until Merv explains that they've ruined her chances of taking first prize.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Timmy goes on an adventure to search for his fairies and a magical wand that will defeat the Darkness.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 50
programme.desc: Casa Paradiso/Gerald''s Tonsils: Grandpa becomes tired of dealing with the boarding house and decides to sell./Gerald has his tonsils removed before a big concert and must come to grips with the fact that his voice has changed.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Otto and Reggie's fierce battle to prove who is the best snowboarder goes too far. Otto breaks his leg but still tries to play hockey.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 15
programme.desc: After failing miserably on a game show for 6th graders, Dad admits he dropped out of school in the 5th grade. The next thing Timmy knows, Dad’s in his class!

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Goldie-Crocks and the Three Fair Bears/Fancy Schmancy: Yet another Squirrely Scout camping trip goes bad when Mr. Crocker and the Fair Bears show up.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Jerk of All Trades/Snack Attack: Timmy gets Jorgen fired. He helps Jorgen find a new job. Sparky makes his own magic dog treats. Crocker tries to buy one million of them in order to make a wish.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The forest is invaded by the beavers' enemies, lumberjacks. These guys just don't cut down trees, they sing, as well!

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Otto's snowboard gets mangled before a competition, smooth-talking, two-faced Snomart rep Dick Shackley offers Ottos a corporate sponsorship.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 48
programme.desc: Arnold lends Sid his room for one evening, but the arrangement backfires when Sid keeps on borrowing the room. / Helga and Patty (the big girl) face off.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 13
programme.desc: When Timmy gripes that being Mom is easier than being a kid, Wanda takes the bait and switches their brains. Now Mom is Timmy, and Timmy is Mom!

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When Ocean Shores is overrun with shoobies'

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Timmy borrows Mark Chang’s Fake-i-fier in order to attend Trixie’s costume party. Unfortunately, he knows nothing about Yugopotamian technology and soon the device is causing Timmy to turn into all sorts of crazy creatures.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Helga's Boyfriend/Crush on Teacher: Helga hatches a plan to "hire" Stinky, (by bribing him with candy bars), to act as her boyfriend in hopes of making Arnold jealous.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Timmy Turner is an average kid - sort of. He's an only child with oblivious parents. But luckily he has Cosmo and Wanda, his wacky fairy godparents who help him hide from evil babysitters, do homework and much more craziness!

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Force of Nature/Viral Vidiots: At a park clean up, Timmy wishes the animals would pick up after themselves. The animals unite and launch an all-out attack on Timmy

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: Tiny Pickles: Babe and Kenzie's new game is ready, but Dub promises the world another game based on a crazy dream he had. The kids make his game and it's terrible. (S1, ep 3)

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Kendall and Jo confront the future of their relationship when she lands her dream role in a movie blockbuster that will film overseas for the next three years.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 121
programme.desc: Buck the Magic Rat: Kenzie saves a rat in the subway and the kids are grossed out. But it starts bringing them luck and they all use it to solve their problems. (S1, ep 21)

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 318
programme.desc: Babe and Kenzie's school project tops the gaming charts as an online sensation! Rapper Double G finds out they used his song and comes to collect his share. Despite their differences, the group teams up to create Game Shakers!

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 314
programme.desc: The Game Shakers have to figure out how to break the news to Dub that they broke his expensive new television.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Griffin films the guys' lives for a reality show.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: A classroom competition to make the Palm Woods more environmentally-friendly turns disastrous.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 123
programme.desc: When Hudson releases false information about a secret level in a game, Game Shakers is besieged by angry, crazy fans. Babe goes on a date with Mason Kendal.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 215
programme.desc: The Game Shakers set Hudson up with a let's play account to help promote their games, but things quickly get out of hand when Hudson puts on Dub's rocket boots for fun.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The guys are excited to head back to Minnesota for the holidays, but Gustavo tells them they have to stay in LA to record a three-song Christmas EP, and it looks like they'll be spending their first Christmas away from home.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: After Josh ruins Drake's chances at having a hit song in the Superbowl, the boys must find a way to make things right. Along for the ride are a crazy houseguest, a bride, and one really big shrimp.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: When Gustavo has to go away on business, he lets the guys house-sit his mansion. While the boys do their best to keep the house in pristine condition, they inevitably destroy everything inside that Gustavo values.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Its date night at the Palm Woods. James helps Carlos on his date with one of the Jennifers, Kendall joins Lucy’s dinner with her parents, and Logan takes a blind date out so he can spy on Camille's date with Jett.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Dirty Blob: After Trip accidentally destroys a copy of the Game Shakers' latest game, the kids must sneak into Dub's studio to retrieve a copy of the game from his tablet. (S1, ep 5)

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 112
programme.desc: Party Crashers: Babe and Kenzie's plans to hang with cool guy Mason are ruined when Bunny and Ruthless crash a birthday party. Dub uses Hudson to make Trip jealous. (S1, ep 12)

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 107
programme.desc: Trip Steals the Jet: Feeling pressure to fit in with Trip's rich friends, Babe convinces Trip to 'borrow' Dub's jet for the night. (S1, ep 7)

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Kendall, James, Logan and Carlos are hockey playing best friends from Minnesota, whose lives are turned upside down after mega-record producer discovers them and moves them to Los Angeles to make them into the next big boy band.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The whole gang has gathered at Drake and Josh's house before Drake's big concert, but thanks to Walter's poor weather predictions they end up stuck in the house due to severe rain.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: When a video of Babe dancing to Dub's new music video goes viral, Dub challenges Babe to a dance battle to prove he's the better dancer.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Logan brings Carlos along to the MCAT test as his good luck charm, but when Carlos somehow gets a higher score, Logan questions his plans to become a doctor.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Josh gets a student teaching job in Miranda's classroom, and Drake potentially discovers his new drummer.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The guys want to go camping, but Gustavo nixes the idea because it’s dangerous. Instead they use their connections to camp on a sound stage, but things go awry as the guys try to show off their roughing it skills.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Josh's long time e-pal Yooka decides to visit from Yudonia, but a Yudonian "Friendship Ceremony" turns out to be a Yudonian wedding!

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: Babe blows the entire Game Shakers ad budget on a high-tech bus bench, only to find out the bench is a magnet for low-lifes and weirdos.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 209
programme.desc: After an online story about Game Shakers snubs Kenzie, she and Babe get in a fight. Upset, Kenzie takes a job as a waitress at a coffee shop and Babe has to try and get her back to Game Shakers.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Spending all their time together since moving to LA has given guys cabin fever, so they decide to spend some time apart.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: Kenzie's dating app causes huge problems for Babe.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Kendall, James, Logan and Carlos are hockey playing best friends from Minnesota, whose lives are turned upside down after mega-record producer discovers them and moves them to Los Angeles to make them into the next big boy band.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Gustavo gets a spiritual guru to help with his anger issues, but when the guru talks Gustavo into letting him run Rocque Records, the boys must do whatever it takes to get back control of Big Time Rush.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Kendall and Logan volunteer at a dog shelter and end up adopting 12 dogs, but a sneaky heath inspector is on to them. Carlos and Jennifer’s puppy love is sickening and it’s up to James and the other Jennifers to rescue them.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The guys get to hang out at Griffin’s beach house for day and invite the Palm Woods kids along. Carlos and Logan hunt for buried treasure, and James falls for a pretty girl who he suspects is a mermaid.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Helen enlists the aide of Drake and Josh after laser eye surgery leaves her temporarily blinded. When they lose Helen after taking advantage of her many at-home amenities, they are forced to ask themselves, who's the blind one in this situation?

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 312
programme.desc: Babe and Kenzie try to locate a cute boy who waved to Kenzie on the subway while Hudson and Trip become obsessed with a model doll house.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: When Drake and Josh decide to turn the tables and prank little Megan, she has the whole family believing that aliens are coming.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: James continues his pursuit of Lucy and buys a motorcycle in order to impress her, but he doesn’t know how to drive it. Kendall teaches Jo how to drive stick-shift, and Carlos & Logan can’t relinquish a childhood treasure.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Kendall and Logan must take care of Rocque Records' newest artist – an out-of-it rock legend until his induction into the Rock & Roll Hall of Fame that night. James and Carlos are stuck babysitting Katie.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: After the boys get in trouble for using Fake ID's Audrey and Walter fear they will fall to a life of crime and sign them up for a "Steered Straight" program, but things start skidding out-of-control when a real criminal befriends them

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Drake convinces Josh that in order to become cooler he must try out for the football team.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When Drake and Josh mistakenly assume that Walter's suspicious behavior means that he is having an affair, they decide to take matters into their own hands, but ultimately end up cheating only themselves.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: The kids at the Palm Woods are organizing their first school dance and the boys of Big Time Rush have secured the perfect location, Gustavo's recording studio.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 218
programme.desc: When Dub and the Game Shakers swap dummies - Bunny for Hudson - The Game Shakers quickly regret it and have to figure out how to get Hudson back.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 311
programme.desc: The Game Shakers go to Wet Willy's Wild Water Park on its last day to try and break the speed record on the extremely dangerous water slide, the Big Ripper.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 24
programme.desc: BTR refuses to record their second album after Gustavo is too hard on them, and the strike pits the determined band against their stubborn producer in a battle of wills.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: BTR is on tour with Victoria Justice and we go inside the guys’ bus to see the craziness that happens on board. When the guys get stuck in traffic, it is up to Victoria to keep the concert audience entertained until they arrive.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The annual Day of Pranks competition at the Palm Woods has arrived and soon a boys vs. girls prank war begins!

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The guys are caught in a web of lies. Kendall has to keep Jo from discovering Lucy has returned to the Palm Woods. Logan’s fib about being sick turns into a medical emergency and Carlos and James claim Rocque Records was robbed.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 26
programme.desc: Hawk has returned and has a new evil plan to take down Big Time Rush. He plans on stealing BTR's new tracks for their second album and releasing them himself.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Kendall buys Jo a gold necklace to show that he’s committed, but Camille thinks Logan bought it for her. Gustavo hangs BTR’s new gold record and Carlos and James wonder what would happen if they played it.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Drake gets in trouble at school and is assigned to mentor a young boy. But when Drake's new "little sibling" likes Josh more than Drake, we discover that brotherly love hurts.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 27
programme.desc: Secrets are being kept at the Palm Woods. Kendall and Camille are spending a lot of time together making Logan suspicious. James reveals he never told Carlos that Heather Fox, Carlos' camp crush, liked him.
